name: transform_csv
description: Transform values in a CSV column using an LLM. Provide natural-language instructions for how each value should be transformed. The transformed CSV is saved to a new file.

path.description: Absolute path to the CSV file to transform

column_name.description: Name of the column whose values will be transformed

instructions.description: Natural-language instructions for transforming each value (e.g. 'translate to English', 'extract the year')
